zh.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特布藍利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Baldock於1552年出生在英國肯特布藍利時，她的父親Sir Thomas Baldock23歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Baldwin27歲。她於1568年2月16日與Clement Forman在英國肯特藍爾爾斯特結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1612年2月28日在她的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國肯特布藍利。

zh-hans.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰肯特布藍利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Baldock于1552年出生在英国肯特布藍利时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Baldock23岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Baldwin27岁。她于1568年2月16日与Clement Forman在英国肯特藍爾爾斯特结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1612年2月28日在她的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国肯特布藍利。

nameMeanings.name: Baldock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Hertfordshire, first named in the 12th century by the Knights Templar, who held the manor there. It was named in commemoration of the city of Baghdad, known in Middle English and Old French as Baldac.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Baldock was born in 1552, in Brenchley, Kent, England, her father, Sir Thomas Baldock, was 23 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Baldwin, was 27. She married Clement Forman on 16 February 1568, in Lamberhurst, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 28 February 1612, in her hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Brenchley, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Baldock est née en 1552, à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Baldock, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Baldwin, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Clement Forman le 16 février 1568, à Lamberhurst, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 février 1612, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Baldock 1552 in Brenchley, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Baldock 23 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Baldwin 27. Sie hat am 16. Februar 1568 in Lamberhurst, Kent, England Clement Forman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Februar 1612 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Brenchley, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Baldock è nata il nel 1552 nel Brenchley, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Baldock, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Baldwin, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Clement Forman il 16 febbraio 1568, nel Lamberhurst, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 28 febbraio 1612, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Brenchley, Kent, England.

ja.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスケントブレンチリー
ja.lifeSummary: Margery Baldockが1552年にイギリスケントブレンチリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Baldockは23歳，母Lady Elizabeth Baldwinは27歳であった。1568年2月16日にイギリスケントランバーハルストでClement Formanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1612年2月28日に故郷で60歳で死去し，イギリスケントブレンチリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Baldock(이)가 1552년 영국 켄트 브렌클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Baldock(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Baldwin(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1568년 2월 16일 영국 켄트 램후르스트에서 Clement Forman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1612년 2월 28일 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 브렌클리에 묻혔다.

mn.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: Brenchley, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Baldock nasceu em 1552, em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Baldock, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Baldwin, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Clement Forman em 16 de fevereiro de 1568, em Lamberhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1612, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Baldock родилась в 1552 г. в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Baldock было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Baldwin, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Clement Forman 16 февраля 1568 г. в местности лэмбирурст, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 28 февраля 1612 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Baldock nació en 1552, en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Baldock, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Baldwin, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Clement Forman el 16 de febrero de 1568, en Lamberhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1612, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra.
